# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';
import { get } from '@vercel/edge-config';

interface EdgeConfigData {
  API_KEY?: string;
  DB_URL?: string;
  FEATURE_FLAGS?: {
    enableNewUI?: boolean;
    enableBetaFeatures?: boolean;
    enableAnalytics?: boolean;
    maxRequestsPerMinute?: number;
  };
}

const DEFAULT_CONFIG = {
  API_KEY: 'vercel_default_key_789',
  DB_URL: 'postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com',
  FEATURE_FLAGS: {
    enableNewUI: false,
    enableBetaFeatures: false,
    enableAnalytics: true,
    maxRequestsPerMinute: 100,
  },
};

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

export default async function handler(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    let apiKey = DEFAULT_CONFIG.API_KEY;
    let dbUrl = DEFAULT_CONFIG.DB_URL;
    let featureFlags = DEFAULT_CONFIG.FEATURE_FLAGS;

    if (process.env.EDGE_CONFIG) {
      try {
        const edgeConfigApiKey = await get<string>('API_KEY');
        if (edgeConfigApiKey) {
          apiKey = edgeConfigApiKey;
        }

        const edgeConfigDbUrl = await get<string>('DB_URL');
        if (edgeConfigDbUrl) {
          dbUrl = edgeConfigDbUrl;
        }

        const edgeConfigFeatureFlags = await get<EdgeConfigData['FEATURE_FLAGS']>('FEATURE_FLAGS');
        if (edgeConfigFeatureFlags) {
          featureFlags = { ...DEFAULT_CONFIG.FEATURE_FLAGS, ...edgeConfigFeatureFlags };
        }
      } catch (edgeConfigError) {
        console.error('Error reading from Edge Config, using defaults:', edgeConfigError);
      }
    }

    const responseData = {
      success: true,
      config: {
        apiKey: maskApiKey(apiKey),
        dbUrl: maskDbUrl(dbUrl),
        featureFlags,
      },
      source: process.env.EDGE_CONFIG ? 'edge-config' : 'defaults',
      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
    };

    return NextResponse.json(responseData, {
      status: 200,
      headers: {
        'Cache-Control': 'public, s-maxage=60, stale-while-revalidate=300',
      },
    });
  } catch (error) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      {
        success: false,
        error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Unknown error',
        config: {
          apiKey: maskApiKey(DEFAULT_CONFIG.API_KEY),
          dbUrl: maskDbUrl(DEFAULT_CONFIG.DB_URL),
          featureFlags: DEFAULT_CONFIG.FEATURE_FLAGS,
        },
        source: 'defaults-fallback',
      },
      { status: 500 }
    );
  }
}

function maskApiKey(key: string): string {
  if (key.length <= 8) return '***';
  return key.substring(0, 4) + '***' + key.substring(key.length - 4);
}

function maskDbUrl(url: string): string {
  try {
    const urlObj = new URL(url);
    if (urlObj.password) {
      urlObj.password = '***';
    }
    return urlObj.toString();
  } catch {
    return '***';
  }
}
